product_overview: CareerAtlas extracts structured profiles from resume PDFs, identifies prioritized skill gaps against a chosen target role, generates a weeks-long, dependency-aware learning roadmap, and researches job matches aligned to the user's profile. The ingestion and multi-agent pipeline is illustrated in the architecture diagram on page 2 and the technology stack summary appears on page 3 of the PRD.
core_goals: Convert a user's resume PDF into a structured, reviewable profile (skills, education, projects, evidence).
Compare the extracted profile to a chosen target role and surface ranked, prerequisite-aware missing skills.
Generate an actionable, week-by-week learning roadmap with milestones, projects and checklists tailored to the user's gaps.
Discover and surface filtered, ranked job opportunities that align with the user's profile and gap status.

features.name: Resume Parsing
features.description: Ingests a resume PDF from storage and returns a deterministic, schema-constrained structured profile (skills, education, projects, signals, evidence) using the extraction agent (Gemini + PyMuPDF4LLM). See the extraction and ingestion flow in the diagram on page 2.
user_flows: Sign in to account -> Navigate to /api/parse-resume -> Submit resume PDF for parsing -> Receive structured profile JSON containing skills, education, projects and evidence -> Review the extracted profile summary
Sign in to account -> Navigate to /api/parse-resume -> Submit unsupported file type or corrupted PDF -> See validation error asking to upload a valid PDF

features.name: Gap Analysis
features.description: Compares the extracted profile JSON against role-specific requirements via semantic retrieval and returns ranked missing competencies with prerequisite ordering and relevance scores (RAG-backed using Pinecone). Refer to the RAG-based gap analysis description on page 1 and the agent table on page 3.
user_flows: Sign in to account -> Navigate to /api/analyze-gaps -> Submit structured profile JSON and selected target role -> Receive ranked missing skills with prerequisites and relevance scores -> Review prioritized gap list
Sign in to account -> Navigate to /api/analyze-gaps -> Submit structured profile JSON without selecting a target role -> See validation error requesting a target role selection

features.name: Roadmap Generation
features.description: Generates a personalized, dependency-aware learning roadmap (week-by-week milestones, suggested projects and actionable checklists) from the ranked gaps using the Deep Researcher agent and retrieval-grounded synthesis. The pipeline and Deep Researcher role are described on pages 2–3.
user_flows: Sign in to account -> Navigate to /api/generate-roadmap -> Submit structured profile JSON and ranked gaps -> Receive a week-by-week learning roadmap with milestones, project suggestions and checklists -> Review and export the roadmap
Sign in to account -> Navigate to /api/generate-roadmap -> Submit profile and request roadmap without providing ranked gaps -> See validation prompt asking to provide or generate a gap profile first

features.name: Job Researching
features.description: Searches public job sources and ranks opportunities aligned to the user's profile and gap status using the Job Finder agent (Tavily + LangGraph orchestration). The job-matching responsibility and outputs are summarized on page 2.
user_flows: Sign in to account -> Navigate to /api/research-jobs -> Submit structured profile JSON and target role -> Receive filtered and ranked job matches aligned to profile and gaps -> Review job listings and links
Sign in to account -> Navigate to /api/research-jobs -> Submit overly broad or empty location/filter parameters -> See validation guidance asking to refine search criteria

routes.description: Extracts resume details via PyMuPDF4LLM and Gemini
Analyzes gaps against a target role
Searches the web for job matches using Tavily and LangGraph

features.name: Resume Parsing
features.description: Downloads resume from storage and parses it

features.name: Gap Analysis
features.description: Fetches user skills and outputs missing skills for target role

features.name: Roadmap Generation
features.description: Creates weeks-long learning plans based on gaps

features.name: Job Researching
features.description: Searches the internet to discover jobs suited to user
